title: The World Tree Awakens
description: The earth trembles as an ancient tree erupts from beneath the ground. Its trunk is wider than a castle, its branches disappear into the clouds, and glowing roots consume everything in their path. A voice echoes from within, offering unimaginable power to anyone willing to claim it.

options.title: Embrace Its Power
options.description: Accept the World Tree's gift and become something greater than human.
options.result: The forbidden knowledge you pursued gives shape to the Tree's offer. You accept, and the person who began this journey becomes something new.
options.locked_reason: You did not pursue the knowledge or bargains needed to survive the Tree's power.

options.title: Seal the Tree
options.description: Use everything you've learned to imprison the ancient power forever.
options.result: Every sacrifice and betrayal becomes part of the binding. The roots still, and the impossible weight of the seal settles upon you.
options.locked_reason: Your path did not uncover the knowledge required to seal the World Tree.

options.title: Walk Away
options.description: Some powers were never meant to be controlled. You leave before the tree can tempt you further.
options.result: You recognize the same temptation you refused before. This time, you leave it behind knowing exactly what might have been yours.
options.locked_reason: Your earlier pursuit of the Tree has carried you too far to simply walk away.
